name: The Grand Stage of Maliss
desc:
When this card is activated, add 1 "Maliss" monster from your Deck to your hand or special summon it to your field if your opponent has 3 or more monsters in their banishment.
For the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except Link Monsters.
Your "Maliss" link monster gain this effect:
● Once per turn, when opponent activate card or effect, banish 1 card on your hand (face down); negate that effect, then banish that card.
You can only activate 1 "The Grand Stage of Maliss" per turn.
strings: Add 1 "Maliss" monster from Deck to hand or Special Summon it
Banish 1 card from hand face-down; negate effect, then banish that card
Cannot Special Summon from Extra Deck, except Link Monsters
